# Acceptance Gate Checklist

## 1. Scope Conformance

- Deliverable matches approved scope.
- No unapproved scope expansion.

## 2. Requirement Traceability

- Each acceptance criterion has implementation evidence.
- BA requirements and technical outcomes are aligned.

## 3. Quality Evidence

- Test evidence exists (unit/integration/e2e where applicable).
- Edge cases and failure handling are documented.

## 4. Operational Readiness

- Rollout/rollback notes are present if required.
- Monitoring/logging impacts are documented.

## 5. Documentation and Handoff

- Final artifacts are complete and accessible.
- Open issues are explicitly listed with owners and due dates.

## 6. Decision

- Result: PASS or FAIL
- If FAIL: mandatory rework items and due date
